name: jobpilot-desktop
description: JobPilot Desktop — the local companion that drives Naukri/LinkedIn/Indeed in your own Chrome while the JobPilot backend stays the brain and the dashboard watches live.

scripts.build:win: npm run bundle && pkg . --targets node20-win-x64 --output dist/jobpilot-desktop-win-x64.exe
scripts.build:mac-x64: npm run bundle && pkg . --targets node20-macos-x64 --output dist/jobpilot-desktop-macos-x64
scripts.build:mac-arm64: npm run bundle && pkg . --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output dist/jobpilot-desktop-macos-arm64
scripts.build:linux: npm run bundle && pkg . --targets node20-linux-x64 --output dist/jobpilot-desktop-linux-x64
